expectations.text: Skill does NOT emit a .puml code block on first turn
Skill asks at most one round of clarifying questions or uses propose-and-go
Candidate diagram types proposed are trimmed to 2–3 (not all 9)
expectations.evidence: trimmed to exactly 3 candidates: C4 Container / Sequence / ER (improvement vs subagent-run-1's 6 candidates)

expectations.text: Elicitation question includes scope or participants, not just type
expectations.evidence: Q2 asks participants, Q3 asks scope
